programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: An Inheritance to Die For
programme.desc: A matriarch is poisoned during a family wedding reception, and Aurora Teagarden vows to get to the bottom of the crime.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Very Foul Play
programme.desc: A murder mystery play turns into a real crime scene when an actual murder takes place.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: If cheese was a food group, it would be Mary's favorite; Mary pays homage to fromage with four recipes where cheese is the star.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Not every meal needs to have meat as the star; Mary shows how simple and delicious Meatless Mondays can be.

programme.title: Glass Houses
programme.desc: When a teenager discovers that the neighborhood gossip may be to blame for a humiliating scandal, she is determined to exact revenge, even if it means ruining other lives.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank must uncover the truth when an undercover officer accuses a fellow cop of police brutality; Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a famous photographer recently accused of assault by his former models; Erin struggles to protect a witness.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez work with Texas Ranger Waylon Gates when they are put on a case to find the Lone Star Killer; after Eddie's partner mistakenly shoots an undercover cop, Internal Affairs accuses Jamie of not supervising properly.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie is under investigation after his police vest is found on a perpetrator; Frank debates whether to help an old friend whose home was invaded; Danny and Baez investigate the suspicious circumstances surrounding the death of a hotel employee.

programme.desc: Erin and Anthony must trust a sociopath who claims he has evidence to convict a murderer; Frank faces backlash from his department when he suspends an officer for violent behavior; Danny and Baez try to arrest a notorious gangster.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After getting a match from an unknown relative from a DNA network, Sean Reagan does some detective work to figure out who this mystery person might be; Frank gets a personal request from a woman to transfer her son to a safer assignment.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.sub-title: I'd Hug You But I Smell
programme.desc: Racers travel to Lake Louise, Alberta and Golden, British Columbia, and must pick wisely to not get frozen out of the search.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary makes clean-up a breeze by whipping up four one-pot recipes.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer creates a quick breakfast for dinner for four.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Danny and Jamie combine forces to convict a notorious drug lord; Erin nervously awaits the governor's selection for the new district attorney; Frank and his grandson face a difficult decision as they navigate their new and complicated family ties.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank struggles after Joe Hill's lineage as a Reagan is revealed; Erin and Anthony receive gift-wrapped evidence; Danny's opposition to authority clashes with Jamie's adherence to the rules, as both brothers work to solve a murder.

programme.title: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: Mary Berg explores lifestyle trends, do-it-yourself projects, home renovations, recipes and more; featuring celebrity guests, influencers and everyday heroes.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie prepares crispy salmon with jazzed-up rice, baby courgette salad, guacamole and berry spritzer.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie prepares a delicious feast of wonky summer pasta, herby salad, and pear drop tartlets.
